creator: admin@vladiom.com.ua
text:
After updating system from 11.0-RELEASE-p10 to 11.1-RC2 wine stopped working!
Wine just not responding, and the process can not be killed!
I tryed i386-wine, i386-wine-devel (2.10,1 and 2.11,1), but the result is the same!

# pkg version -v | grep i386-wine
i386-wine-devel-2.11,1             =   up-to-date with index

# uname -srm
FreeBSD 11.1-RC2 amd64
